5. Major Requirements (effective Fall 2025)

** Scholarship in Practice – DSSP (satisfied by BMGT495)

(C- or higher, regular grading option)

Scholarship in Practice – DSSP (3) (non-major)

___ BMGT332 Quantitative Models for Management Decisions (3)

c. Signature Courses (can overlap w/ Dist. Studies and/or Diversity)

___ BMGT385 Operations Management (3)

Big Question – SCIS (3)

___ BMGT430 Data Modeling in Business (3)

Big Question – SCIS (3)

___ BMGT431 Data Analytics (3)

d. Diversity (can overlap w/ Dist. Studies and/or Signature Courses)

Understanding Plural Societies – DVUP (3)

Complete two elective courses (6 credits) from List A or one elective course from List A and one elective course from List B:

Underst. Plural Soc./Cultural Competence – DVUP/DVCC (1-3)
